name: setPortBits - Lowspeed and CANcab 1041
title: setPortBits - Lowspeed and CANcab 1041
description: To enable the different CAN bus tranceiver modes Normal Mode (standard at start) or Sleep Mode.
For this function you have to take care that the channel number is the logical one which is used by CANalyzer / CANoe according to the assignment in CAN Driver Configuration.

parameters.name: Bit 4 – 7
parameters.description: Reserved and must be set to "0"

description: Changing the mode of two lowspeed CANcabs:
